rulings.Case Title: 200 KANSAS OWNER LLC VS. KEENWAWA, INC. DBA BRIGHTLOOM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appellate Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2024 line 1. PETITIONER 200 KANSAS OWNER LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR APPELLATE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: PHILIP COOKE VS. ROBERT TAYAC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Against Andrew Peterson And His Counsel Of Record For Unsuccessfully Opposing Defendants Motion To Compel Granted On September 26, 2023 & For Failing To Comply With
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2024 line 12. DEFENDANT ROBERT TAYAC, ERIC PARTON NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST ANDREW PETERSON AND HIS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR UNSUCCESSFULLY OPPOSING DEFENDANTS MOTION TO COMPEL GRANTED ON SEPTEMBER 26, 2023 & FOR FAILING TO COMPLY WITH is GRANTED as to the original motion and as to this motion to the extent it involved addressing Plaintiff's failure to comply with the Court's order on the original motion. rulings.Case Title: FANX, INC. VS. JAMES DAVIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2024 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT FANX, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to January 25, 2024. The notice of this demurrer identifies "cross-defendant Andrew Won X, Inc" as one of the moving parties. "Andrew Won X, Inc" is not a named cross-defendant in the cross-complaint filed by Samantha Davis Doolittle and James Davis. The named cross-defendants are: FanX, Inc, Andrew Won and SMI Demolition. No later than January 12, 2023 an amended notice of demurrer must be filed by the appropriate parties and first appearance fee must be paid by the moving parties that have not otherwise appeared in the action to date. The Notice must be substantially similar to the notice filed on November 17, 2023 except the date of the hearing shall be listed as "January 25, 2023" and the moving parties must be clarified (e.g. Cross-Defendant Andrew Won; or Cross-Defendant Andrew Won X, Inc erroneously sued as Andrew Won; or FanX, Inc only, etc). Additionally, no later than January 12, 2023 moving party shall file a proof of service for its November 17, 2023 filing reflecting timely service on Vivek Sridharan, counsel of record for the Plaintiff in this action. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
